user.title: Solar Load Split
user.description: Choose the grid import/export power sensor once. Solar Load Split will use it to discover matching device power sensors.

discovery_confirm.title: Solar Load Split discovered power sensors
discovery_confirm.description: Home Assistant found a device power sensor that may fit Solar Load Split. Check the suggestion and adjust it if needed.

abort.already_configured: This device and grid sensor pair is already configured.
abort.discovery_missing: The discovered sensor information is no longer available.
